title: episcia ochroleuca
intro: Episcia ochroleuca, also known as the yellow-leaved episcia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Episcia ochroleuca has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Episcia ochroleuca include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Episcia ochroleuca is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
